summary: Iteration 4 retest after main agent fixed (1) missing planByMonths/PLAN_TIERS import in Admin.js and (2) reject_user not nulling requested_plan_months. Both fixes verified end-to-end. Backend pytest suite is now 39/39 green (the previously-informational reject test was strengthened to assert requested_plan_months becomes null on both the reject response and a follow-up /auth/me). Frontend admin approval flow fully passes via Playwright: modal opens with no runtime error, plan-current-value defaults to the user's requested 3 months, modal-requested-plan chip shows '3 meses · $69', plan-step-1/3/6/12 chips update plan-current-value AND plan-summary price ($25/$69/$129/$230) AND expiration date, modal-approve-btn POSTs /api/admin/users/{id}/approve and the row flips to 'Suscrito · 3 meses · vence ...'. No console/page errors during the run.

issues: Adjacent inline elements concatenate without separator in textContent: plan-current-value reads '3meses', plan-summary reads 'Vence el 11 nov 2026$129', row-plan reads '3 mesesvence 13 ago 2026'. Visual layout is fine (separate flex/grid rows) but assistive tech / screen readers will read it as one run-on string. Add a space, bullet, or aria-label so the spoken output is e.g. '3 meses · vence 13 ago 2026'.
CopyableField textContent still concatenates label+value+'Copiar' with no separator (e.g. 'BancoBanco PichinchaCopiar'). Same accessibility note.

action_items: Optional / non-blocking: improve a11y by adding spaces or aria-labels in plan-current-value, plan-summary, row-plan, and CopyableField so the rendered textContent is space-separated (purely UX/SR polish, no functional impact).
critical_code_review_comments: Admin.js missing import bug is fully resolved; PLAN_OPTIONS is now derived from PLAN_TIERS (single source of truth) and planByMonths is imported.
Backend reject_user now nulls requested_plan_months; if the user re-uploads without sending plan_months, requested_plan_months stays null as expected.

Still applicable from iter3 (not blocking): server.py is ~426 lines; consider splitting into auth/admin/receipts routers. ApproveIn could use Pydantic Literal[1,3,6,12] to drop the manual membership check inside approve_user.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_gymnite.py (strengthened test_reject_clears_requested_plan_months from informational to a real assertion: response and /auth/me both return requested_plan_months: null)

success_rate.frontend: 100% on the iter4 admin-approval acceptance criteria: modal renders, slider defaults to user's requested plan, chips update value+price+expiration, approve succeeds and the row updates correctly. No page errors during the run.

test_credentials: Admin admin@gymnite.com / 12345 (auto-seeded). Iter4 created test_iter4_ui_<ts>@example.com (now subscribed to 3 meses) and TEST_iter4_rej_<ts>@example.com (rejected, requested_plan_months back to null).
seed_data_creation: Pytest spawns one TEST_iter4_rej_<ts>@example.com user (registered, uploaded with plan_months=12, then rejected) — left in DB as no_subscribed with requested_plan_months=null. UI playwright test created test_iter4_ui_<ts>@example.com — now subscribed/3 meses.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 critical bug (Admin.js missing import → modal crash) and iteration 3 minor bug (reject not nulling requested_plan_months) are both fixed and verified. Backend regression: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://neon-members-1.preview.emergentagent.com python -m pytest backend/tests/test_gymnite.py -v (39/39). Frontend: register a new user, upload with plan_months=N, login as admin, search the email, click approve-btn → expect plan-current-value=N, modal-requested-plan visible, approve closes modal and row becomes Suscrito + N meses. The only remaining feedback is non-blocking a11y polish (spaces/aria-labels in concatenated text strings).
rca of the issue: Iter3 root causes were (1) Admin.js used planByMonths from /lib/plans.js without importing it, causing a ReferenceError on ApprovalModal mount that took down the whole admin page, and (2) reject_user $set omitted requested_plan_months so a rejected user kept a stale requested-plan default. Iter4 fix verified: line 22 of Admin.js now imports { PLAN_TIERS, planByMonths } from '@/lib/plans' and line 31 derives PLAN_OPTIONS = PLAN_TIERS.map(t => t.months); server.py reject_user $set now includes requested_plan_months: None. Reproduction-on-fix: clicking approve-btn-{id} now opens the modal without console errors, and POST /api/admin/users/{id}/reject returns requested_plan_months: null.
